data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attempt counters and retry timestamps.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of tracking attempt counters and retry timestamps, but the evidence provided does not include any specific data or records that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for these features, yet no concrete evidence demonstrating their implementation or tracking was presented. This leads to a conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of attempt counters or retry timestamps provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the tracking of attempt counters and retry timestamps.
